subcodes.first_line: O Javád! Hearken unto the Call of the Lord of creation. He, verily, summoneth thee through His grace and remembereth thee even as He hath remembered thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد ان استمع ندآء مالک الایجاد انه یدعوک فضلا من عنده و یذکرک کما ذکرک
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
